chatgpt.mau: ~1 billion MAU (estimated, Jan 2026); 900M weekly active users confirmed by OpenAI on Feb 27, 2026; 50M paying subscribers
chatgpt.market_share: ~60.4% of global generative AI chatbot market; 45.3% of US mobile daily AI users (Jan 2026, down from 69.1% in Jan 2025)
chatgpt.buzz_volume_note: 5.35B monthly web visits (Feb 2026, Similarweb); 2.5B daily prompts; 82.17% of AI-referred web traffic originates from ChatGPT

claude.mau: ~18.9M MAU on web (third-party estimate, early 2026); 12.48M MAU on mobile app (Feb 2026, up 49% MoM per AICPB); Anthropic has not officially disclosed a consolidated consumer MAU figure
claude.market_share: ~3.5–4.5% global generative AI chatbot market (consumer); ~29% enterprise AI assistant market share; 70% of Fortune 100 use Claude; 300K+ business customers
claude.buzz_volume_note: Paid subscriptions more than doubled in early 2026 per Anthropic spokesperson; Super Bowl ads mocking ChatGPT drove surge in consumer signups Jan–Feb 2026

gemini.mau: 750M MAU (Gemini app, Q4 2025, officially disclosed in Alphabet Q4 2025 earnings, Feb 4 2026); AI Overviews (Gemini-powered) reach 2B monthly users in Google Search. Note: Alphabet's Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 29, 2026) did not re-disclose app MAU.
gemini.market_share: ~13.5% global AI chatbot market; website traffic share rose to 25% from 6% YoY (as of May 2026 estimates); leads India's AI chatbot downloads (52%); 8M+ Gemini Enterprise paid seats across 2,800+ companies
gemini.buzz_volume_note: Gemini 3 launch cited as major momentum driver; 85B monthly API requests (Jan 2026, +142% YoY); 40% QoQ growth in Gemini Enterprise paid MAU per Q1 2026 earnings; 16B tokens/min via API

recent_changes.text: Alphabet Q1 2026 earnings: Gemini Enterprise paid MAU up 40% QoQ; first-party models process 16B tokens/min via API (up 60%); app MAU not re-disclosed

key_people.name: Sundar Pichai
key_people.quote: The Gemini App has grown to over 750 million monthly active users

deepseek.mau: ~130–131.5M MAU globally (Jan 2026 estimates; Business of Apps: 130M end-2025; deepseak.org: 131.5M Jan 2026); 143M MAU in China alone (Aug 2025, Wired); DeepSeek does not officially disclose global MAU
deepseek.market_share: Not disclosed officially; ranked #2 in China's AI chatbot market behind Doubao (155M WAU); ~4.5% of global AI chatbot market (various estimates); 89% domestic China chatbot share per some reports; 173M total app downloads since Jan 2025 launch
deepseek.buzz_volume_note: DeepSeek-V3 and R1 disrupted global AI markets on launch in Jan 2025; 170K+ GitHub stars (most-starred AI project in 2025); MIT-licensed open weights drove massive derivative adoption; 5.7B API calls/month

recent_changes.text: DeepSeek V4 – almost on the frontier

key_people.name: Liang Wenfeng
key_people.quote: Each iteration of DeepSeek has been released open-source and free to use

grok.mau: ~50–64M MAU (xAI internally shared 64M with staff in Sep 2025; third-party estimates range 50–64M as of early 2026); xAI does not regularly publish official user counts
grok.market_share: 17.8% US chatbot market share (Jan 2026, Apptopia via Reuters), up from 1.9% Jan 2025; 3rd-place US chatbot behind ChatGPT and Gemini; estimated 2–5% global AI chatbot market; 15.2% of US mobile AI daily users (Jan 2026)
grok.buzz_volume_note: 298.6M monthly visits to grok.com (Feb 2026, Similarweb); xAI merged with SpaceX Feb 2, 2026 at $1.25T combined valuation; regulatory scrutiny in EU, Malaysia, Indonesia over image generation; Apple App Store tensions in early 2026

key_people.name: Elon Musk
key_people.quote: Cited 'orbital data centres' as rationale for xAI-SpaceX merger

copilot.mau: Not disclosed (Microsoft does not break out standalone Copilot MAU publicly); Copilot leads AI apps in avg. session time at 27.2 min/DAU (Jan 2026, Apptopia); embedded across Windows, Office 365, GitHub, and Azure
copilot.market_share: ~14.3% global AI chatbot market (combined ChatGPT+Copilot OpenAI-based share ~73.3%); 27.2 min avg. time/DAU ranks 2nd among AI apps behind Claude
copilot.buzz_volume_note: Microsoft spends $500M+ annually integrating Claude into Copilot products alongside OpenAI; GitHub Copilot widely cited as dominant AI coding tool; Copilot Studio expanding enterprise agent deployments

recent_changes.text: VS Code inserting 'Co-Authored-by Copilot' into commits regardless of usage
Microsoft confirmed $500M+ annual spend to integrate Anthropic Claude into Copilot alongside OpenAI models

llama.mau: Downloads: Meta AI (powered by Llama) reported 1B+ MAU across Meta apps (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger) as of early 2026; Llama model weights have been downloaded hundreds of millions of times from Hugging Face and Meta's own hub — exact figure not disclosed
llama.market_share: Derivatives: Thousands of fine-tuned and quantized Llama derivatives on Hugging Face; Llama is the dominant open-source base model for derivative builds; used by 100K+ organizations in enterprise deployments; powers a significant share of on-device and self-hosted AI deployments globally
llama.buzz_volume_note: Meta AI surpassed 1B MAU (across integrated apps) per Alphabet Q4 2025 earnings context; Llama-3 series remains the most-forked open-source LLM family; Llama 4 released in 2025 further extended multimodal capabilities

recent_changes.text: Meta AI reported 1B monthly users across its integrated apps (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook), per Alphabet earnings context
